function.name: submit_work
function.arguments: {"requirements": [{"title": "Goodbye endpoint returns JSON farewell", "description": "The /goodbye endpoint MUST return HTTP 200 with Content-Type application/json and a JSON body containing a 'message' field whose value is 'Goodbye, World!'. The route MUST be registered on the same ServeMux as the existing / route. Include unit tests using net/http/httptest that exercise the handler against the mux."}]}
